rule_candidates.confidence_reason: The text explicitly states that versions prior to 12.4.0 were not validated and may exhibit stability issues with the specified OS release.
rule_candidates.remediation_hint: Upgrade Driver Pack to version 12.4.0 or later before migrating to Enterprise OS 2026.1 to ensure peripheral stability.
rule_candidates.source_excerpt: Customers upgrading to Enterprise OS 2026.1 should be aware that Driver Pack versions prior to 12.4.0 were not validated against this release and may exhibit reduced peripheral stability, particularly with USB-C docking accessories and external display adapters. Fleets that have not yet standardized on the current Driver Pack baseline are encouraged to complete that upgrade ahead of any OS migration work.

rule_candidates.confidence_reason: The text suggests prioritizing a firmware refresh to v6.4.2 to resolve a known issue with battery health reporting in versions 8.1.x
rule_candidates.remediation_hint: Update System Firmware to version v6.4.2 or later for ProBook and Enterprise Laptop Series units on firmware 8.1.x.
rule_candidates.source_excerpt: Separately, field reports indicate that ProBook and Enterprise Laptop Series units shipped with System Firmware versions in the 8.1.x line may report inaccurate battery health percentages following extended sleep cycles. While this does not affect charging safety, IT administrators managing large laptop fleets may wish to prioritize the firmware refresh for these device classes during the v6.4.2 maintenance cycle rather than treating it as a routine, lower-priority update.

rule_candidates.confidence_reason: The text explicitly states that builds older than 2025.2 produce inconsistent telemetry reporting.
rule_candidates.remediation_hint: Upgrade Enterprise OS to version 2025.2 or newer to ensure consistent telemetry reporting.
rule_candidates.source_excerpt: It has also been observed that Security Agent deployments paired with Enterprise OS builds older than 2025.2 can produce inconsistent telemetry reporting to centralized management consoles, even when all other components meet published minimums. Affected environments should treat this as a signal to revisit their OS upgrade timeline rather than assuming the Security Agent installation itself is at fault.

rule_candidates.source_excerpt: EdgeStation Workstations require NIC Firmware 4.2.0 or later when deployed with Platform Driver Pack 12.5.0.
